channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ezra Collective Shares New Song, Details New Album and Tour
item.description: 🎶 Groove into the weekend with Ezra Collective's fresh beats! 🚀 New song, album, and tour on the way! 🌟 #EzraCollective #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Role Model Is Back with Third LP ‘Chuck Timely & the Hourglass’
item.description: 🎉 Role Model fans, the wait is over! 🎶 Dive into the vibes of 'Chuck Timely & the Hourglass' now! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Levitation Fest adds American Football, Bikini Kill, Melt Banana, Los Thuthkanaka, more to 2026 lineup
item.description: 🌟 Levitation Fest just got even better with American Football, Bikini Kill, and more joining the 2026 lineup! Who's ready to rock out? 🎸🎶 #LevitationFest #MusicNews

item.title: Gracie Abrams Plots Huge ‘Daughter’ Tour
item.description: ✨ Brace yourselves for a swoon-worthy tour with Gracie Abrams 🎶 Who's grabbing tickets? 💃 #GracieAbrams #DaughterTour

item.title: Ravyn Lenae announces new album, shares “Handle”
item.description: 🌟 Exciting news alert! 🎶 Get ready to groove with @ravynlenae's upcoming album featuring the track "Handle"! 🎤 #NewMusicAlert #RavynLenae
